---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("pacman", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("pacman")
}
library(pacman)
p_load(
  tidyverse,
  skimr,
  jsonlite,
  GGally,
  readxl,
  janitor,
  naniar,
  dplyr,
  VIM,
  caret,
  ggplot2,
  car,
  forcats,
  corrplot
)
```

```{r}
df<- read_csv("C:\\Users\\zuz12\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\predictive project\\v1.csv")

```

```{r}
missing_per1 <- colMeans(is.na(df)) * 100
missing_per1
```


```{r}
df$county <- NULL
df$description <- NULL
df$region_url<- NULL
df$url<-NULL
df$image_url<-NULL
df$size<-NULL
df$VIN<-NULL
df$id<-NULL
df$region<-NULL
df$posting_date<-NULL
df$model<-NULL
```

```{r}
skim(df)

```

```{r}
missing_per <- colMeans(is.na(df)) * 100
missing_per
```

```{r}
df <- df %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

```

```{r}
df %>% get_dupes()

```

```{r}
df_no_duplicates <- df %>% distinct()
df_no_duplicates %>% get_dupes()
```
```{r}
skim(df_no_duplicates)

```
#inconsist col
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$condition)

df_no_duplicates$condition[df_no_duplicates$condition == ""] <- NA
```
```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$condition)) * 100

```
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$title_status)

```
```{r}
df_no_duplicates$title_status[df_no_duplicates$title_status == ""] <- NA

df_no_duplicates$title_status[df_no_duplicates$title_status == "missing"] <- NA
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$title_status)) * 100

```

```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$manufacturer)

df_no_duplicates$manufacturer[df_no_duplicates$manufacturer== ""] <- NA
```
```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$manufacturer)) * 100

```
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$cylinders)

df_no_duplicates$cylinders[df_no_duplicates$cylinders== ""] <- NA
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$cylinders)) * 100

```
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$fuel)

```
```{r}
df_no_duplicates$fuel[df_no_duplicates$fuel== ""] <- NA

prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$fuel)) * 100
```
```{r}
unique(df$transmission)

df_no_duplicates$transmission[df_no_duplicates$transmission== ""] <- NA
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$transmission)) * 100

```

```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$drive)

df_no_duplicates$drive[df_no_duplicates$drive== ""] <- NA
```
```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$drive)) * 100

```

```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$type)

df_no_duplicates$type[df_no_duplicates$type== ""] <- NA
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$type)) * 100

```
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$paint_color)

df_no_duplicates$paint_color[df_no_duplicates$paint_color== ""] <- NA
```
```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$paint_color)) * 100

```
```{r}
unique(df_no_duplicates$state)

df_no_duplicates$state[df_no_duplicates$state== ""] <- NA
```
```{r}
prop.table(table(df_no_duplicates$state)) * 100

```
```{r}
# Check for negative or zero values in price
neg_or_zero_price <- df_no_duplicates$price <= 0 & !is.na(df_no_duplicates$price)
cat("Number of negative or zero price values:", sum(neg_or_zero_price), "\n")
```

```{r}
df_no_duplicates$price[df_no_duplicates$price <= 0 & !is.na(df_no_duplicates$price)] <- NA

```

```{r}
skim(df_no_duplicates)

```

```{r}
imputed_data1<- hotdeck(
  data = df_no_duplicates,
  variable =c("price","year","manufacturer","condition","cylinders","fuel","odometer","title_status","transmission","drive","type","paint_color","lat","long")

)

```

```{r}
imputed<-read_csv("C:\\Users\\zuz12\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\predictive project\\imputed_data.csv")

```

```{r}
imputed$price_imp<-NULL
imputed$year_imp<-NULL
imputed$manufacturer_imp<-NULL
imputed$condition_imp<-NULL
imputed$cylinders_imp<-NULL
imputed$fuel_imp<-NULL
imputed$odometer_imp<-NULL
imputed$title_status_imp<-NULL
imputed$transmission_imp<-NULL
imputed$drive_imp<-NULL
imputed$type_imp<-NULL
imputed$paint_color_imp<-NULL
imputed$lat_imp<-NULL
imputed$long_imp<-NULL
imputed$...1 <-NULL
imputed$state<-NULL
```

```{r}
imputed$manufacturer <- fct_lump(imputed$manufacturer, n = 5)

```

```{r}
table(imputed$manufacturer)

```

```{r}
imputed$cylinders <- fct_lump(imputed$cylinders, n = 3)  # Keep top 3 cylinder counts
imputed$type <- fct_lump(imputed$type, n = 4)  # Keep top 4 vehicle types
imputed$paint_color <- fct_lump(imputed$paint_color, n = 4)  # Keep top 4 vehicle types
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
train_index1 <- createDataPartition(imputed$price, p = 0.9, list=F)
train_df1 <- imputed[train_index1, ]
temp_df1 <- imputed[-train_index1, ]
vald_index1 <- createDataPartition(temp_df1$price, p = 0.5, list=F)
vald_df1 <- temp_df1[vald_index1, ]
test_df1 <- temp_df1[-vald_index1, ]
```

```{r}
boxplot(train_df1$price, main = "before Price Distribution", col = "green")

```
```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(data, column) {
  Q1 <- quantile(data[[column]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(data[[column]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  IQR <- Q3 - Q1
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
  data %>% filter(data[[column]] >= lower_bound & data[[column]] <= upper_bound)
}
```

```{r}
numeric_cols <- c("price", "year", "odometer", "lat", "long")

```


```{r}
for (col in numeric_cols) {
  train_df1 <- remove_outliers(train_df1, col)
}
```

```{r}
boxplot(train_df1$price, main = "Cleaned Price Distribution", col = "green")
```
```{r}
ggplot(train_df1, aes(x = type)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Car Types")
```

```{r}
ggplot(train_df1, aes(x = price)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2000, fill = "darkgreen", color = "white") +
  xlim(0, 50000) +  # Show only cars priced below $50k
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Car Prices (under $50k)", x = "Price", y = "Count")
```

```{r}
ggplot(train_df1, aes(x = long, y = lat)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Geographic Distribution of Listings")
```

```{r}
ggplot(train_df1, aes(x = drive)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "orange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Drive Types", x = "Drive", y = "Count")
```
```{r}
train_df1 %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_line(color = "dodgerblue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue", size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Listings by Model Year", x = "Year", y = "Listings")
```
```{r}

full_model <- lm(price ~ ., data = train_df1)


step_model <- step(full_model, direction = "forward", trace = TRUE)

summary(step_model)
```


```{r}
p_load(corrplot)

numeric_data <- train_df1 %>% select(where(is.numeric))
cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data, use = "complete.obs")




# Visualize correlations
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", tl.cex = 0.7)


# Find highly correlated variables
high_cor <- findCorrelation(cor_matrix, cutoff = 0.8)
filtered_data <- numeric_data[, -high_cor]


high_cor
```

```{r}
anova_model<-lm(train_df1$price~train_df1$manufacturer+train_df1$condition+train_df1$cylinders+train_df1$fuel+train_df1$title_status+train_df1$transmission+train_df1$drive+train_df1$type+train_df1$paint_color,data=train_df1)
```

```{r}
anova(anova_model)

```
```{r}
p_load(glmnet)

```

```{r}
control1 <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5,savePredictions = TRUE)
```



```{r}
lm_model <- train(
  price ~.,
  data = train_df1,
  method = 'lm',
  trControl = control1
)
```

```{r}
summary(lm_model)

```
```{r}
lm_model$finalModel|>vif()
```

```{r}
p_load(mgcv)

```

```{r}
#Generalized Additive Model
gam_model <- gam(price ~ s(year) + s(odometer) + manufacturer + condition + cylinders + fuel + title_status + transmission + drive + type + paint_color+s(long)+s(lat), data = train_df1)
```

```{r}
summary(gam_model)

```

```{r}
lasso_model <- train(
  price ~.,
  data = train_df1,
  method = 'glmnet',
  trControl = control1,
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(
    alpha = 1,
    lambda = 10^seq(-3, 3, length = 100)
  )
)
```


```{r}
ridge_model <- train(
  price ~.,
  data = train_df1,
  method = 'glmnet',
  trControl = control1,
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(
    alpha = 0,
    lambda = 10^seq(-3, 3, length = 100)
  )
)
```


```{r}
p_load(caretEnsemble)

```


```{r}
model_list <- list(
  lm = lm_model,
  lasso = lasso_model,
  ridge = ridge_model
)
```


```{r}
ensemble <- caretStack(
  model_list,
  method = "lm",
  trControl =control1
)
```

```{r}
ensemble_pred_val <- predict(ensemble, newdata = vald_df1)
ensemble_pred_test <- predict(ensemble, newdata = test_df1)
```


```{r}
# Function to compute MAPE
mape <- function(actual, predicted) {
  mean(abs((actual - predicted) / actual), na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}

# Helper function to extract numeric predictions
extract_numeric_predictions <- function(pred) {
  if (is.list(pred) || is.matrix(pred) || is.data.frame(pred)) {
    # Handle caret models (lasso_model, ridge_model) or ensemble
    if ("pred" %in% names(pred)) {
      return(as.numeric(pred$pred))  # caretStack ensemble predictions
    } else {
      return(as.numeric(unlist(pred)))  # Flatten lists or matrices
    }
  } else if (inherits(pred, "gam")) {
    # Handle GAM predictions
    return(as.numeric(pred))
  } else {
    return(as.numeric(pred))  # Default case for numeric vectors
  }
}

# Generate predictions for all models with proper extraction
lm_pred_val <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(lm_model, newdata = vald_df1))
lasso_pred_val <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(lasso_model, newdata = vald_df1))
ridge_pred_val <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(ridge_model, newdata = vald_df1))
gam_pred_val <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(gam_model, newdata = vald_df1))
ensemble_pred_val <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(ensemble, newdata = vald_df1))

lm_pred_test <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(lm_model, newdata = test_df1))
lasso_pred_test <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(lasso_model, newdata = test_df1))
ridge_pred_test <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(ridge_model, newdata = test_df1))
gam_pred_test <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(gam_model, newdata = test_df1))
ensemble_pred_test <- extract_numeric_predictions(predict(ensemble, newdata = test_df1))

# List of models and their predictions
models <- list(
  "Linear Regression" = list(val = lm_pred_val, test = lm_pred_test),
  "LASSO" = list(val = lasso_pred_val, test = lasso_pred_test),
  "Ridge" = list(val = ridge_pred_val, test = ridge_pred_test),
  "GAM" = list(val = gam_pred_val, test = gam_pred_test),
  "Ensemble" = list(val = ensemble_pred_val, test = ensemble_pred_test)
)

# Function to create comparison table
create_comparison_table <- function(actual, predicted, model_name, set_name) {
  actual <- as.numeric(actual)
  predicted <- as.numeric(predicted)  # Ensure predicted is numeric
  if (length(actual) != length(predicted)) {
    stop("Length mismatch between actual and predicted values for model: ", model_name)
  }
  df <- data.frame(
    Model = rep(model_name, length(actual)),
    Set = rep(set_name, length(actual)),
    Actual_Price = actual,
    Predicted_Price = predicted,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  df %>% slice_head(n = 10)
}

# Function to compute metrics
eval_metrics <- function(actual, predicted, model_name, set_name) {
  metrics <- postResample(pred = predicted, obs = actual)
  mape_val <- mape(actual, predicted)
  data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Set = set_name,
    MAE = metrics["MAE"],
    RMSE = metrics["RMSE"],
    Rsquared = metrics["Rsquared"],
    MAPE = mape_val
  )
}

# Generate individual outputs for each model
for (model_name in names(models)) {
  cat("\n=== Model:", model_name, "===\n")
  
  # Comparison tables
  cat("\nComparison Table (Validation Set):\n")
  print(create_comparison_table(vald_df1$price, models[[model_name]]$val, model_name, "Validation"))
  cat("\nComparison Table (Test Set):\n")
  print(create_comparison_table(test_df1$price, models[[model_name]]$test, model_name, "Test"))
  
  # Metrics
  metrics <- rbind(
    eval_metrics(vald_df1$price, models[[model_name]]$val, model_name, "Validation"),
    eval_metrics(test_df1$price, models[[model_name]]$test, model_name, "Test")
  )
  cat("\nPerformance Metrics:\n")
  print(metrics)
  
  cat("\n------------------------\n")
}
```
